diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,157 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: Creates Hono app instances, initializes with options, supports handler factory patterns
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
+- Safe summary: Universal helper factory for creating Hono apps and middleware with typed handler composition (1-10 handlers).
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: Context object for extracting routing metadata
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types, src/utils/url
+- Safe summary: Extracts matched route information from request context with caching.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext
+- Reads as: Context object, creates WebSocket upgrade middleware with event handlers
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for event-driven real-time communication with typed context.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
+- Reads as: Context object for HTTP Cookie API access
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Comprehensive cookie utility for reading, writing, and deleting signed cookies.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: Hono app, generates client for testing with custom fetch
+- Neighbor files: src/client, src/context
+- Safe summary: Creates client for testing Hono apps with custom fetch implementation.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: Context object for runtime environment detection
+- Neighbor files: Detects Bun, Node, Deno, Cloudflare Workers, Fastly, Edge Runtime
+- Safe summary: Runtime environment detection for polyfilling globals across platforms.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: Template strings for CSS generation with dynamic classnames
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/helper/jsx, src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: Experimental CSS-in-JS helper for server and client with dynamic classnames and keyframes.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify, toHash
+- Reads as: Template arguments for CSS processing
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css
+- Safe summary: Shared CSS utilities for generating selectors, classnames, and keyframes with custom slug support.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: Request/response objects for outgoing proxy requests
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Fetch wrapper for proxying requests with header sanitization per RFC 2616/9110.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: Hono app instance
+- Neighbor files: src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Development helper for inspecting routes, handlers, and router name in apps.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: Template strings with escaped values
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/utils/html
+- Safe summary: Escaped HTML template rendering with callback support.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssg, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: Exports from ssg.ts and middleware.ts
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Router plugin for static site generation with parameter support and SSG-specific headers.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, defaultPlugin, createPool
+- Reads as: Hono app, FileSystemModule, SSGOptions
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG runner that fetches routes and saves static files to disk in parallel.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, AddedSSGDataRequest, SSGParamsMiddleware
+- Reads as: Context request headers including SSG detection
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: Controls SSG behavior with request headers and request parameter generation for static content.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: Context for streaming responses with callback functions
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Unified streaming API dispatcher for various streaming modes.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: Context, callback function, TransformStream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/utils/stream
+- Safe summary: Base streaming API using browser TransformStream for efficient chunked responses.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: Context, callback function, SSE message objects
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming with event id, event type, and retry mechanisms.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: Context, callback function
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/utils/stream
+- Safe summary: Text-specific streaming response with plain text content type and chunked transfer encoding.
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: Context object for accept header parsing
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Safe summary: Re-export wrapper around accepts functionality.
+
+## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Main exports or names:
